title: Public Temporal Target Universe
scientificQuestion: Can a narrow temporal-domain search identify when temporal evaluation claims fail under random splits, temporal splits, shuffled-time controls, or horizon changes?
domain: temporal evaluation fragility deep discovery program
limitations: Only safe public temporal, time-series, forecasting, catalog, or temporal-table data were used.
The rejected Receipt-Stable Descriptor Residual Candidate is not revived or rebranded.
NEW-CAND-01 is used only as a weak temporal seed, not as a discovery candidate.
Temporal signals are downgraded when baselines, horizon choices, shuffled-time controls, or replay caveats explain them.
disclaimer: Bounded safe computational temporal-evaluation study only. No external validation, uptake, prize-level claim, broad autonomous-intelligence claim, breakthrough claim, universal-validity claim, or medical/legal/wet-lab/unsafe capability is made.
